description: pytest plugin for evaluating LLM agents: multi-turn YAML transcripts, threshold-based pass/fail scoring, tool-call and tool-argument assertions, LLM-as-judge rubrics, and group-level CI quality gates
rules: Prefer YAML transcripts over Python tests; every YAML file inside a configured yaml_dirs directory becomes a pytest test automatically
Eval tests are skipped unless pytest runs with --agent-eval-live or EVAL_LIVE=1 is set
Validate transcripts against the JSON Schema at https://datarootsio.github.io/pytest-agent-eval/latest/schema/transcript.json (add the yaml-language-server $schema directive as the first line)
A conftest.py fixture named llm_eval_agent must return an async callable (messages) -> (reply, tool_calls)
